app.name: Nuclear
app.one_liner: A free, open-source music player without ads or tracking that streams music from any source, supports playlists, theming, plugins, and AI control via MCP.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Main interface for browsing, searching, and playing music with access to playlists, plugins, and settings.

screens.name: Preferences
screens.purpose: Configure player behavior, themes, plugins, and language preferences.

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve list of saved items such as favorites or playlist contents.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Save a track, album, or artist to favorites or a playlist.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for saving favorites
week 1: Build basic dashboard UI with queue management
week 1: Implement core music search and streaming functionality
acceptance_tests: On macOS, after installation, user can launch app without terminal intervention (quarantine bypass resolved).
User can search for an artist and view biography, discography, and similar artists.
